name: IRC_IS_COORDNTR_REQUESTS
description: This table stores the interview schedule coordinator requests information.

columns.Name: COORDNTR_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table.System generated.

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status as a lookup code. Lookup value associated with ORA_IRC_IS_COORDNTR_REQUEST_STATUS lookup type.

columns.Name: COORDNTR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person-Id of the user who coordinates the interview schedule.Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: REQUESTED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person-Id of the user who created request to interview schedule to the coordinator.Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table

columns.Name: LOCATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_IS_LOCATION_TYPE which can be an interview in person, through phone or through a web conference.

columns.Name: MEETING_DURATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Interview meeting duration.We should use existing lookup ORA_IRC_IS_MEETING_DURATION

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_NOTES
columns.Comments: Stores the notes entered by the request creator.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
